name: boundary-case-check
triggers: The deliverable is executable or rule-like: a function, regex, parser, query, validator, formula, filter, allowlist, denylist, matcher, sanitizer, or threshold policy that will face untyped inputs
The artifact being produced is code or a matching/threshold rule
A draft ships a rule-like artifact with no boundary input actually executed
counterindications: A named, executed test suite already exercises the edges
The deliverable has no input domain (pure prose or analysis)
